---
title: "Land cover comparison"
author: "FFL"
date: today
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
library(here)
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggalluvial)

species_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Black spruce", "2" = "White spruce", "3" = "Aspen",
  "4" = "Birch",        "5" = "Mixed",         "6" = "Potential forest"
)
species_colours <- c(
  "Black spruce"     = "#1b4f72",
  "White spruce"     = "#2980b9",
  "Aspen"            = "#f0b27a",
  "Birch"            = "#e67e22",
  "Mixed"            = "#7dcea0",
  "Potential forest" = "#aab7b8"
)

# list.files returns alphabetical order which mis-sorts yr1, yr10, yr11 before
# yr2 — extract the integer year and reorder before stacking.
load_species_stack <- function(landscape) {
  files <- list.files(
    here(landscape, "supporting_data", "gis", "init"),
    pattern = "forest_species_init_lc_yr\\d+\\.tif$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  yr_nums <- as.integer(gsub(".*lc_yr(\\d+)\\.tif$", "\\1", basename(files)))
  rast(files[order(yr_nums)])
}

landscapes <- c("landscape_alaska_01", "landscape_alaska_02")
landscape_labels <- c(
  landscape_alaska_01 = "Alaska 01",
  landscape_alaska_02 = "Alaska 02"
)
```

## Species area over time

```{r}
#| label: area-time-series
#| fig-height: 6
area_df <- map_dfr(landscapes, function(lname) {
  r <- load_species_stack(lname)
  map_dfr(seq_len(nlyr(r)), function(i) {
    freq(r[[i]]) |>
      as.data.frame() |>
      transmute(
        landscape = lname,
        year      = 1983L + i,
        species   = species_labels[as.character(value)],
        area_ha   = count * 100 / 10000  # 10 m cells → ha
      )
  })
}) |>
  filter(!is.na(species))

ggplot(area_df, aes(year, area_ha, colour = species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = species_colours) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~landscape, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(landscape = landscape_labels)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Area (ha)", colour = NULL,
       title = "Forest species area 1984–2014") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Spatial distribution at three decades

Four forest species at 1984, 1999, and 2014.

```{r}
#| label: decade-data
#| message: false
decade_yrs  <- c(1L, 16L, 31L)
decade_labs <- c("1984", "1999", "2014")

decade_df <- map_dfr(landscapes, function(lname) {
  r <- load_species_stack(lname)
  map_dfr(seq_along(decade_yrs), function(j) {
    as.data.frame(r[[decade_yrs[j]]], xy = TRUE) |>
      rename(code = 3) |>
      mutate(landscape = lname, year = decade_labs[j])
  })
}) |>
  mutate(year = factor(year, levels = decade_labs))
```

```{r}
#| label: decade-maps
#| fig-height: 10
species_map_df <- decade_df |>
  filter(code %in% 1:4) |>
  mutate(
    species = factor(
      species_labels[as.character(code)],
      levels = c("Black spruce", "White spruce", "Aspen", "Birch")
    )
  )

walk(landscapes, function(lname) {
  p <- ggplot(
    filter(species_map_df, landscape == lname),
    aes(x, y, fill = species)
  ) +
    geom_raster() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = species_colours) +
    facet_grid(species ~ year) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL,
         title = paste("Species distribution —", landscape_labels[lname])) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      axis.text       = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks      = element_blank(),
      panel.grid      = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
  print(p)
})
```

## Species transitions 1984 → 2014

```{r}
#| label: transition-matrix
#| fig-height: 8
transition_df <- decade_df |>
  filter(!is.na(code), code %in% 1:6) |>
  mutate(species = species_labels[as.character(code)]) |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, landscape, year, species) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = species) |>
  count(landscape, from = `1984`, to = `2014`) |>
  filter(!is.na(from), !is.na(to)) |>
  mutate(area_ha = n * 100 / 10000)

ggplot(transition_df, aes(to, from, fill = area_ha)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  facet_wrap(~landscape, ncol = 1,
             labeller = labeller(landscape = landscape_labels)) +
  labs(x = "Species 2014", y = "Species 1984", fill = "Area (ha)",
       title = "Species transitions 1984 → 2014") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Species flow 1984 → 1999 → 2014

```{r}
#| label: alluvial
#| fig-height: 8
alluvial_df <- decade_df |>
  filter(!is.na(code), code %in% 1:6) |>
  mutate(species = species_labels[as.character(code)]) |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, landscape, year, species) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = species) |>
  filter(!is.na(`1984`), !is.na(`1999`), !is.na(`2014`)) |>
  count(landscape, yr1984 = `1984`, yr1999 = `1999`, yr2014 = `2014`)

ggplot(alluvial_df,
       aes(axis1 = yr1984, axis2 = yr1999, axis3 = yr2014, y = n)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = yr1984), width = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_stratum(width = 0.3, fill = "grey90", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum)), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("1984", "1999", "2014")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_colours, na.value = "grey80") +
  facet_wrap(~landscape, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(landscape = landscape_labels)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Cells", fill = "Species (1984)",
       title = "Species flow 1984 → 1999 → 2014") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
